_comment: SAK Wave-B durability state (sak-wave-b-durability/v1). The durability half of the Wave-B (Refiner) wave of the Phase-4 SAK corpus migration: per-file branch (refiner/wave-b/<hash>) + atomic commit + 3-retry-with-escalation (plan 033 v7 § 14.17.1 + § 14.17.2) + open-PR park (plan 048 v8 Delta 1). Parked files (open-PR or escalated) are routed into the SINGLE reconciliation queue (SAK-RECONCILIATION-QUEUE.json) — parked != failed. Validated by specs/state-machines/schema/sak-wave-b-durability.schema.json; consumed by scripts/sak-wave-b-durability.py. These rows are ILLUSTRATIVE seeds (one per terminal outcome); hand-maintained / generated upstream — the module reads + reasons, it never mutates this file. The atomic-commit invariant holds for every row: committed === (state === COMMITTED).

files.escalation_reason: 3-retry ladder exhausted (3 failed attempts); last failure mode: behavioral-eval-regressed-other-cases (plan 033 § 14.17.2)
open-PR: Wave B never runs on a file with an open PR (plan 048 Delta 1)
